sizing_rule.note: Use tighter stops (2.0 ATR) when market confirms directional change on daily+ timeframes with 3+ confirmation bars. Tighter stops reduce absolute loss per trade while improving R-multiple on winners. Sizing tied to risk per trade via R-multiple framework.

source_rule_text: A trader should use tighter stop losses when market conditions permit (shorter timeframes, predicted major changes confirmed by market action, and personal risk tolerance allows), because tighter stops reduce absolute losses per trade while improving R-multiple potential on winners.
